mapper.select: SELECT public_id, post_id, user_id, parent_id, message, child_count, created_at FROM replies WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND parent_id IS NULL
SELECT public_id, post_id, user_id, parent_id, message, child_count, created_at FROM replies WHERE parent_id = #{parentReplyId}
SELECT r.public_id, r.post_id, r.user_id, r.parent_id, r.message, r.child_count, r.created_at FROM replies r WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT #{size}

WITH cursor_reply AS ( SELECT created_at, id FROM replies WHERE public_id = #{lastId.value} ) SELECT r.public_id, r.post_id, r.user_id, r.parent_id, r.message, r.child_count, r.created_at FROM replies r CROSS JOIN cursor_reply c WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND ( r.created_at < c.created_at OR (r.created_at = c.created_at AND r.id < c.id) ) ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT #{size}
